description: A WordPress plugin that allows users to get and give loans. This app is developed as a WordPress plugin; WordPress is used as a proxy to an external DB. The plugin works as a Ractive.js-based SPA. It is fully modular: there is the possibility to load code by components or use minified files (separately for JS, CSS, and HTML) for all modules. Real-time data is received via the WSS protocol. I developed a library that includes a page router, area controllers, and a window inspector. I also developed a library that monitors DB data updates, provides caching, and has a convenient interface for retrieving and updating data. On the server side, I wrote an SQL-API library that, in terms of operating principles, is similar to GraphQL. Moreover, we developed a table component that can display thousands of lines of data in a specified viewport. I configured all servers from scratch.
technologies: APIs: webtransfer (through own lib, like GraphQL), PerfectMoney, Payeer, OkPay
team: 5 persons (1x Lead, Front dev, Back dev, DevOps; 1x JS Node dev; 1x Junior JS dev; 1x HTML/CSS coder; 1x Designer)
